source: How to Read a Keepa Chart (FULL Tutorial) Amazon FBA 2024.txt @10:20 — brand JVN Hair present on its own listing but only won 15% of the buy box over 90 days; narrator: 'I think that this listing is okay'. (JVN Hair is neither friendly- nor avoid-listed, so no brand adjustment fires — this case is really testing that a THIRD-PARTY brand-owner's limited presence, distinct from Amazon's own share, doesn't trip amazon-shares-buybox.)
